email.title: Email or Username
email.description: Your Coursology account email or username.

test_url.title: Test URL
test_url.description: Full URL of the Coursology test, starting at Item 1. Example: https://coursology-qbank.com/qbanks/ambossone/tests/1776681015

max_questions.title: Max Questions
max_questions.description: Stop after scraping this many questions. Set to 0 to scrape all.

start_from.title: Start From Question #
start_from.description: Resume from this question number. Leave at 1 for auto-detection from saved state.

delay_min_ms.title: Min Delay Between Questions (ms)
delay_min_ms.description: Minimum random delay between question navigations in milliseconds.

delay_max_ms.title: Max Delay Between Questions (ms)
delay_max_ms.description: Maximum random delay between question navigations in milliseconds.

save_audio.title: Save Audio Files
save_audio.description: Decode and save base64 audio to the Apify Key-Value Store.

headless.title: Headless Browser
headless.description: Run the browser without a visible window. Always true on the Apify platform.
